title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 built a solar system simulation by deriving orbital motion from physics first principles and used it to predict solar eclipses. This demonstrates the model's ability to reason about complex physical systems.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 building a solar system simulation by deriving orbital motion from physics first principles, then using that simulation to predict solar eclipses. It matters as a demonstration of the model reasoning about a complex physical system rather than reproducing a stored result. The key takeaway: the model constructs orbital mechanics from underlying physics and applies the result to forecast eclipse events.
